name: Google Calendar
description: Manage events, scheduling, and calendars with Google Calendar via MCP server with full CRUD operations

fields.label: Google OAuth Client ID
fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console with Calendar API enabled

fields.label: Google OAuth Client Secret
fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console

fields.label: Google OAuth Refresh Token
fields.description: Refresh token obtained via OAuth consent flow with calendar scope

calendarId.description: Calendar ID to operate on (defaults to primary calendar)
